ideation: This animation sequence will simulate the motion of a speeding bullet train.  The arms will move in a way that suggests forward momentum and speed, possibly mimicking the motion of someone pushing something forward with great effort. The animation will focus on a forward-reaching motion, with the arms moving in a coordinated but not perfectly symmetrical way to give the effect of a powerful, slightly uneven thrust. The sequence will start with the arms slightly back, then move forward powerfully, and finally end with the arms returning to a neutral position. I will leverage the existing examples to ensure a natural range of motion for the robot's arms.

frames.beat: arms push forward with great force
arms reach their peak forward thrust
arms recoil back to a resting state
